pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page showing key HYIP sections, quick filters, and navigation into listings, scam list, forum, and dashboard. Also exposes a global search bar and teaser cards for featured, new, and problematic programs.
primary_functions: Provide high-level overview of featured paying programs, new programs, and scam alerts
Offer global search bar for finding specific HYIP programs or threads
Provide quick links into HYIP listings, problematic programs, forum, dashboard, and saved programs

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'HYIP Listings' in header or main CTA
Click on 'Problematic Programs' card or header link
Click on a featured or new program card
Submit global search form in header
Click on 'Forum' in header or forum promo block
Click on 'Dashboard' in header
Click on 'Saved Programs' in header
Click on 'Settings' in header or profile/avatar menu

access_methods.description: Main entry via 'Home' header link and site logo
Direct access via root URL or bookmarks

pages.name: HYIP Listings
pages.description: Master list of HYIP programs with advanced filters and sorting for discovery, evaluation, and problem-program browsing. Supports both 'all_programs' and 'problematic_programs' views via URL parameter.
primary_functions: Filter programs by status (e.g., paying, scam, not_paying), payment method (e.g., Bitcoin), ROI, minimum deposit, running days, start date, and user rating
Sort programs by rating, ROI, start date, or other key metrics and open program detail pages
Toggle between views such as all_programs and problematic_programs (scam list) using preconfigured filters
Subscribe or unsubscribe to scam alerts when viewing problematic_programs

incoming_params.description: Determines listing mode: 'all_programs' or 'problematic_programs'
Comma-separated Program.status values for status filter (e.g., 'paying', 'scam,not_paying')
Comma-separated payment methods (e.g., 'bitcoin,usdt') to filter programs
Minimum daily ROI percentage filter (e.g., 3 for 3%)
Maximum daily ROI percentage filter; can be omitted to leave open
Minimum bound for program.min_deposit_usd filter
Maximum bound for program.min_deposit_usd filter (e.g., 20 for task 1)
Filter for minimum running_days (e.g., 10 for task 2)
Filter for maximum running_days (e.g., 60 for task 2, 15 for task 5)
ISO datetime string lower bound for start_date filter (e.g., now-7 days for task 6)
ISO datetime string upper bound for start_date filter
Minimum payout_rating_value filter (e.g., 5 to show only programs with 5/5)
Sort option key (e.g., 'rating_desc', 'roi_desc', 'start_date_newest')
Current pagination page for listings

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on program title or card in listings
Click 'Problematic Programs' tab when currently in all_programs view
Click 'All Programs' tab when currently in problematic_programs view
Click 'Subscribe to Scam Alerts' or 'Unsubscribe' button, which also calls toggleScamAlertsSubscription
Click breadcrumb link back to Home
Click 'View Saved Programs' from inline saved-status summary

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'HYIP Listings' and 'Problematic Programs' header links with different view params
Filters and sort are reflected in URL query parameters for sharable listing states

pages.name: Program Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single HYIP program including plans, stats, community feedback, polls, and personal actions. Supports switching between overview, discussion, and poll sections via internal tabs or a URL parameter.
primary_functions: Display full program information including status, payment methods, running days, daily ROI, minimum deposit, and 30-day total return
Allow adding or removing the program from the users watchlist, bookmarks, or blacklist
Provide a Discussion/Reviews section where the user can read comments, sort by newest, and write reviews with star ratings and text
Host a community poll widget for voting on investment sentiment (e.g., too risky, will not invest)
Link to commenter profiles from the discussion section for follow-up or private messaging

incoming_params.description: Program.id for the HYIP to display; required for loading details, stats, discussion, and poll
Optional section selector such as 'overview', 'discussion', or 'poll' to open the corresponding tab by default

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Watchlist' after adding program to watchlist via saveProgram
Click 'View Bookmarks' after bookmarking the program
Click 'View Blacklist' after blacklisting the program
Click on a commenter username in the Discussion/Reviews tab
Click 'Message' action next to a comment (optional shortcut for task 8)
Click breadcrumb link back to Home

access_methods.description: Accessed by navigating to program_detail.html with an 'id' query parameter
Linked from listings, search results, dashboard, saved programs, and forum posts

pages.name: Saved & Blacklisted Programs
pages.description: Consolidated view of the users watchlisted, bookmarked, and blacklisted HYIP programs. Supports quick navigation back to program details and reclassification or removal of saved entries.
primary_functions: List all programs saved to the watchlist for potential investment tracking
List all bookmarked programs flagged as favorites or selected options
List all blacklisted programs marked as scam or to be avoided
Allow removal or reclassification of programs between watchlist, bookmarks, and blacklist

incoming_params.description: Optional initial subview to show: 'all', 'watchlist', 'bookmarks', or 'blacklist'
Filter passed through to getSavedPrograms to limit results to a specific save_type

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved program name in any of the lists
Click 'Go to Dashboard' button from header or contextual link
Click 'Manage Risk Alerts' link to modify notification preferences

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Saved Programs' header link
Tab selection preserved via 'tab' query parameter

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.description: Personal dashboard summarizing active programs, alerts, and key metrics based on user preferences. Shows only those saved programs that meet the user-configured ROI, status, and currency settings, and highlights risk changes.
primary_functions: Display active HYIP programs that match the users minimum ROI threshold and other display settings (e.g., >=1.5% daily ROI in USD)
Highlight status or risk-level changes for watchlisted and bookmarked programs
Provide quick access actions to open program detail pages or manage saved status (watchlist/bookmark/blacklist)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an active program card in dashboard
Click 'Customize Dashboard' link
Click 'Manage Saved Programs' link

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Dashboard' header link
Accessed after changing settings via 'View Dashboard' buttons

pages.name: Settings
pages.description: User preferences center for dashboard display options, currency, and notification/risk alert settings. Supports separate tabs for dashboard display, currency, and notifications (including scam alerts and watchlist risk alerts).
primary_functions: Set default display currency (e.g., USD) for ROI, deposits, and returns across the site
Adjust dashboard filters such as minimum daily ROI to display and whether to hide closed or finished programs
Configure notification preferences including in-site alerts for watchlisted program status/risk changes and scam alerts
Save and apply updated preferences to the dashboard and other relevant views

incoming_params.description: Optional settings subsection to open, such as 'dashboard' or 'notifications'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Dashboard' or navigate back after saving updated settings
Click 'Review Scam List' from the scam alerts preference area

access_methods.description: Accessible directly via 'Settings' header link or profile/avatar menu

pages.name: Forum Index
pages.description: Top-level community forum page listing discussion categories related to HYIP programs. Used as an entry point into New HYIPs announcements, general discussion, and scam reports.
primary_functions: List main forum categories such as New HYIPs, General Discussion, and Scam Reports
Show basic stats for each category (thread and post counts, last activity)
Provide entry points into specific forum categories for browsing or posting

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a forum category name such as 'New HYIPs'

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Forum' header link
Linked from homepage forum teaser blocks

pages.name: Forum Category
pages.description: Displays threads within a specific forum category, such as New HYIPs. Supports sorting, pagination, and entry points to view threads or create a new thread.
primary_functions: List all threads in the selected category with titles, authors, reply counts, and last updated time
Provide sorting options (e.g., newest, most replied) for browsing threads
Offer a 'New Thread' action to create a new topic in this category

incoming_params.description: ForumCategory.id determining which category's threads to list (e.g., New HYIPs)
Sort option for threads such as 'newest' or 'most_replied'
Current page for thread pagination
Number of threads per page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a thread title in the category listings
Click 'New Thread' button within the category
Click breadcrumb link back to Forum Index

access_methods.description: Accessed with a 'categoryId' query parameter from Forum Index

pages.name: Forum Thread
pages.description: Detailed view of a single forum thread with all posts and replies. Supports replying, pagination, and subscription toggles for updates.
primary_functions: Display the initial post and subsequent replies in chronological or configurable order
Allow the user to reply to the thread to continue discussion
Provide basic thread actions such as subscribe/unsubscribe to thread updates

incoming_params.description: ForumThread.id identifying the thread to display
Current page of posts to show within the thread
Number of posts per page
Sort order of posts, e.g., 'asc' or 'desc'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a poster's username/avatar in the thread
Click breadcrumb link to return to thread's category

access_methods.description: Accessed by navigating to forum_thread.html with a 'threadId' parameter

pages.name: New Forum Thread
pages.description: Creation form for starting a new forum thread in a specified category such as New HYIPs. Accepts a categoryId via URL, and on successful submission redirects to the created thread.
primary_functions: Allow the user to enter a thread title and select an optional prefix or tag (e.g., high_risk, new)
Provide a rich-text body area to describe program details including start date, minimum deposit, payment methods, and plan terms
Optionally include a disclaimer line indicating hypothetical or example-only posts
Publish the new thread and redirect the user to the resulting thread view

incoming_params.description: ForumCategory.id for the category in which the new thread will be created (e.g., New HYIPs)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Successful submission of the 'Post Thread' form
Click 'Cancel' or 'Back to Category' link from the new thread form

access_methods.description: Accessed by clicking 'New Thread' in a Forum Category, which passes categoryId
Direct navigation with categoryId query parameter for power users

pages.name: User Profile
pages.description: Profile page for another community member, showing basic info and interaction options. Also lists the user's recent program comments and forum posts to give context before messaging.
primary_functions: Display basic user information such as username, join date, and recent activity (comments or threads)
Show a list or summary of the users latest program comments or forum posts
Provide a 'Send Private Message' button to initiate a direct message to this user

incoming_params.description: CommunityProfile.id of the user whose profile is being viewed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Send Private Message' button on profile
Click on a program name within the user's recent comments list
Click on a thread title within the user's recent forum posts list

access_methods.description: Accessed via links on usernames in program comments or forum posts, using profileId param

pages.name: Compose Message
pages.description: Private message compose form for contacting another user about their HYIP experiences. Supports prefilled metadata about the related program and comment that triggered the message.
primary_functions: Display the recipient username pre-filled based on the selected user profile
Allow the user to enter a message subject (e.g., question about payout experience)
Allow the user to enter the message body with multiple specific questions
Send the private message to the selected user and confirm that it has been sent

incoming_params.description: CommunityProfile.id of the message recipient; used to prefill recipient info
Optional Program.id that the message refers to, for context
Optional ProgramComment.id that prompted the message, for context

outgoing_connections.trigger: After successful 'Send Message', link or auto-redirect back to recipient's profile

access_methods.description: Accessed when user clicks 'Send Private Message' from a User Profile or comment action
Can be accessed directly with recipientProfileId query parameter for deep links

pages.name: Search Results
pages.description: Result page for searches initiated from the global header search bar. Displays both HYIP programs and forum threads matching the query, with controls to focus on one type or paginate through results.
primary_functions: Display matching HYIP programs and forum threads based on the entered search query
Allow filtering or tabbing between program results and forum results
Provide direct links to program detail pages (e.g., CryptoMax 300%) and relevant threads

incoming_params.description: Search term entered in the global search bar (e.g., 'CryptoMax 300%')
Optional filter of what to show: 'all', 'programs', or 'threads'
Current page number for search results pagination
Number of results per page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a HYIP program result such as 'CryptoMax 300%'
Click on a forum thread search result

access_methods.description: Accessed as the target of the global search form on all pages
Query, type_filter, and pagination preserved in URL for sharing search states

pages.name: About
pages.description: Information about the sites purpose, approach to HYIP listing, and risk philosophy. Static content is loaded via a generic static-page interface.
primary_functions: Explain the mission of the HYIP listing and discussion platform
Clarify the nature and risks of HYIP investments and the informational-only role of the site

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About' link in site footer

pages.name: Help / FAQ
pages.description: Guidance on using filters, watchlists, blacklists, reviews, and other site features. Can explain the multiple user tasks like creating watchlists, posting reviews, and configuring dashboard alerts.
primary_functions: Answer common questions about navigating listings, filtering programs, and interpreting metrics
Explain how to use personal tools like watchlist, bookmarks, blacklist, dashboard, and notifications

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Help / FAQ' footer link

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact page for support, feedback, or reporting issues with program data. Contains static explanatory text and a contact form for submissions.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form for user inquiries or feedback
Offer alternative contact details or guidelines for reporting scams or data errors

incoming_params.description: Optional subject line preset for the contact form (e.g., 'Report Data Error')

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' footer link
Contact form submission posts via submitContactForm

pages.name: Terms of Use
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the HYIP listing and discussion site. Static text loaded via the static page content interface.
primary_functions: Present the terms and conditions for accessing and using the site
Outline limitations of liability and the non-advisory nature of the information provided

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Terms of Use' footer link

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Policy describing how user data and activity information are handled. Content is managed via the static page content API.
primary_functions: Describe what data may be collected and how it is used or stored
Explain user choices related to data privacy and notifications

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Privacy Policy' footer link

header_links.description: Homepage with featured programs, scam highlights, and navigation
All HYIP programs with full filters and sorting
Scam and not-paying HYIP list with blacklist and alert options
Community discussion forum including New HYIPs announcements
Personal dashboard showing active programs and risk alerts

footer_links.description: About the HYIP listing and its purpose
Frequently asked questions and usage help
Contact form for support or feedback
Information on data privacy and handling
